title: Community Create VII
description: A modpack with a variety of mods centered around the Create mod.
body:
![Community Create VI logo text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b46e525ebad8c23b140a8768c327e36b1a29563.png)

**Community Create VII** is the seventh iteration of our long-running Create-focused community project, hosted by **EvolveMC**.

This modpack is built around the **Create Mod** and a selection of addons and supporting mods. 

### You can expect...

* A strong focus on **Create** and many Create addons
* Trains, factories, logistics, automation and engineering
* Decorative blocks, building tools and creative freedom
* QoL, performance and immersion improvements
* Balanced for **multiplayer and long-running worlds**

Whether you’re new to Create or have been building factories for years, **everyone is welcome**.

### Community & Server

This modpack is made primarily for our **public community server**, which is **German-speaking only**.
Support, announcements and participation all happen via our Discord.

> **Join us on Discord:** [https://evolvemc.de/discord](https://evolvemc.de/discord)

Hosted and maintained by **EvolveMC**.

---

## (🇩🇪) Community Create VII

**Community Create VII** geht in die siebte Runde!

Auch dieses Jahr haben wir wieder ein **eigenes Modpack** erstellt, mit der **Create-Mod als Fokus** und vielen Erweiterungen drumherum.
Der Fokus liegt auf Technik, Automatisierung, Zügen, Fabriken, aber genauso auf Kreativität, Bauen und einer aktiven Community.

Egal ob Create-Neuling oder Veteran: **Alle sind willkommen.**

> Alle Infos & Mitspielen über unseren Discord:
[https://evolvemc.de/discord](https://evolvemc.de/discord)

– **EvolveMC**
